title: The Parson of Panamint
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Harold Shumate, Adrian Scott
actors: Charles Ruggles, Ellen Drew, Phillip Terry
plot: The mayor of wild and woolly mining town Panamint, is in San Francisco to fetch a preacher for the new church, and happens upon young Philip Pharo, as handy with his fists as with a sermon. Upon his arrival, it appears to Philip t...
